jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.

lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted successfully; /api/status healthy; /health redirected to login, /api/health and /api/system-health returned 401 instead of 500; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P5 system-health and Health page unification
lastRun.summary: Unified the Health Center with the system-health API. The server page now passes the full system self-check report, the client renders individual system check rows beside repair guidance, and the client refreshes self-check data from /api/system-health while preserving the VPS health overview.
validation: recent production service logs checked with no new error/warn matches
lastRun.deployment: Production services restarted successfully and smoke test passed.
lastRun.nextTarget: P6 architecture hardening: move command/deployment SSH execution out of synchronous API paths, strengthen download URL SSRF protections, unify rate limiting store, and replace shell-string exec surfaces where practical. Because the current checklist is now down to P6 architecture items, the next run should consider whether to start a P6 deployable slice or perform a fresh comprehensive audit.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
